title: Well-done: atomic_t with acquire/release semantics for link_ctx_initialized
description: lichen_l2.c:129-131 uses atomic_t for link_ctx_initialized flag with explicit acquire/release semantics commentary. This prevents torn reads under aggressive optimization and ensures link_ctx stores complete before the flag is visible. For a security-critical context with crypto keys, this level of care is warranted. The SECURITY comment explains why - keep both the code and the comment.
